about-facility-img.query: Over Two Decades of Metal Forming Excellence Founded in 1995, ARTITECT MACHINERY has grown from a small workshop into a global leader in metal folding technology. We combine precision German engineering with innovative design to deliver machines that set the standard for accuracy, reliability, and productivity.
